languages.text: {n}Разномастные участники процессии склоняются в глубоком поклоне. Среди них вы замечаете знакомые фигуры специалистов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Разномастные участники процессии заканчивают свое признание низким поклоном. В самом конце процессии вы замечаете знакомые фигуры медикариев. Первым следует вивисектор, как обычно сияющий дружелюбной улыбкой.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Разномастные участники процессии склоняются в глубоком поклоне. Среди них вы замечаете знакомые фигуры специалистов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}
{n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}

{n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. At the very tail of the column, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers. The Vivisector comes first, beaming with his usual friendly smile.{/n}
{n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}
{n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}奇妙な行列の参加者たちは深く頭を下げる。列の最後尾には、医務官の姿が。まずは解剖医が、いつもの親しみやすい笑顔で登場する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. At the very tail of the column, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers. The Vivisector comes first, beaming with his usual friendly smile.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alacalı kafile üyeleri, derin bir saygıyla eğiliyor. Aralarında Sektör Biyonika uzmanlarının tanıdık simalarını görüyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alacalı kafile üyeleri, derin bir saygıyla eğiliyor. Aralarında Sektör Biyonika uzmanlarının tanıdık simalarını görüyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这支杂乱的队伍深深鞠躬。你在人群中看见了那些熟悉的仿生区专家的身影。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这支杂乱的队伍深深鞠躬。你在人群中看见了那些熟悉的仿生区专家的身影。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Mitglieder der zusammengewürfelten Prozession verneigen sich tief. Unter ihnen siehst du die vertrauten Gestalten der Experten des Sektors Bionica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the motley procession bow deeply. Among them you see the familiar figures of the experts of the Sector Bionica.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Mitglieder der zusammengewürfelten Prozession verneigen sich tief. Unter ihnen siehst du die vertrauten Gestalten der Experten des Sektors Bionica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les membres de cette procession hétéroclite vous adressent une profonde révérence. Parmi eux, vous reconnaissez la silhouette des experts du secteur Bionica.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los miembros de la extraña comitiva hacen una profunda reverencia. Entre ellos reconoces a los expertos del Sector Bionica.{/n}
